subject: Analyze and document all plugin scripts
description:
Read every script in `packages/saga-utils/src/scripts/` (worker.ts, create-story.ts, find.ts, schemas.ts, and any others). Produce a document at `docs/plugin-scripts.md` covering:

1. Purpose and CLI interface of each script
2. Input/output formats (arguments, stdin, stdout, exit codes)
3. Dependencies between scripts
4. How scripts interact with git, GitHub (gh CLI), and the filesystem
5. Error handling patterns
6. How scripts are bundled and distributed (check package.json build config)

Include usage examples for each script.
doneWhen: docs/plugin-scripts.md exists with comprehensive coverage of all 6 sections.
